title: No Smithing Template ReFabriced
description: No Smithing Template is a lightweight functional mod designed to streamline the smithing process in Minecraft 1.20+. The primary goal is to simplify equipment upgrades, restoring the more intuitive and cost-effective "classic" crafting experience.
body:
Overwiew

    This is an unofficial port of No Smithing Template (by mizi_ao6324) for Fabric.

    The features of this mod is same as original mod. Configuration is implemented via Forge Config API Port mod.

UNOFFICIAL NOTE

  • If there are issues in this mod (Unofficial ReFabriced Edition), but not in original mod, please do not report issues in original repository. Please report issues to Dilideguazi/No_Smithing_Template_ReFabriced repository.
